posts.author: sramamurthy
posts.community: RBM Infra - a less discussed SME
posts.text: There seems to be no basis in fact that can be verified from publicly available sources that corroborates the filing. No publicly available data seems to exist of Sujok Global Private Limited and it also feels unlikely that these two companies together can either muster the financial resources of the scale proposed in the filing or indeed master the complex technology that is required to pull off HBM manufacturing.

posts.author: Prabhakar29
posts.community: RBM Infra - a less discussed SME
posts.text: I could not find Sujok Global private limited , Korean semi conductor company through google search . There is a company Sujok Global private limited in acupressure business in Nagpur , which has some links with Korea. I don’t understand how to take this news now .
